query:
SELECT 
  vp.id,
  vp.variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL2,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL3,
  vp.effectiveDate,
  vp.createdAt
FROM variant_pricing vp
JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-B004'
ORDER BY vp.createdAt DESC;
